basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Mechanical/Materials/Production/Chemical Engineering or related disciplines from a recognised university with first class, Bachelor's degree in Mechanical/Materials/Production/Chemical Engineering or related disciplines from a recognised university with first class
qualification.details: Master's degree in Mechanical/Materials/Production/Chemical Engineering or related disciplines from a recognised university with first class. Bachelor's degree in Mechanical/Materials/Production/Chemical Engineering or related disciplines from a recognised university with first class. Desirable: A good understanding of microstructural characterization, corrosion analysis.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000 + 20% HRA or Rs. 30000 + 20% HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with first class in Mechanical/Materials/Production/Chemical Engineering or related disciplines, along with a Bachelor's degree with first class in the same fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 37,000, plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I role?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an online interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate I in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the desirable qualification for this post?
faq.answer: A good understanding of microstructural characterization and corrosion analysis is considered desirable for this position.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Calicut located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Calicut is located in Calicut, Kerala.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be an age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit for this position. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any specific age criteria.
